name: Gajakesari Yoga
condition: Jupiter in kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) from Moon
effects: Intelligence, fame, wealth, respected in society. Person becomes wise and influential. Good for public life, teaching, advisory roles.
strengthFactors: Stronger if Jupiter is in own/exalted sign. Weakened if Jupiter is debilitated, combust, or aspected by malefics.

name: Budhaditya Yoga
condition: Sun and Mercury conjunct in same house
effects: Sharp intellect, excellent communication skills, scholarly mind. Good for careers in writing, teaching, consulting, IT, law.
strengthFactors: Best when Mercury is not combust (more than 14 degrees from Sun). Strongest in houses 1, 4, 5, 7, 9, 10.

name: Raj Yoga
condition: Lord of kendra (1/4/7/10) and lord of trikona (1/5/9) conjunct or mutually aspect each other
effects: Power, authority, success in career, leadership qualities. Rise in status and wealth. Government connections possible.
strengthFactors: Strongest when involving 9th and 10th lords. Multiple Raj Yogas amplify each other.

name: Dhana Yoga
condition: Lords of 2nd and 11th houses connected (conjunction, aspect, or exchange). Also 1st lord with 2nd/11th.
effects: Wealth accumulation, financial prosperity, multiple income sources. Good for business and investment.
strengthFactors: Stronger with benefic planets. Jupiter involvement amplifies. Weakened if lords are debilitated.

name: Viparita Raja Yoga
condition: Lords of 6th, 8th, or 12th houses placed in each other's houses (e.g., 6th lord in 8th, 8th lord in 12th)
effects: Success through adversity. Gains from enemies' loss. Unexpected rise after difficulties. Fortune from inheritance or insurance.
strengthFactors: Strongest when all three dusthana lords are in each other's houses.

name: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga
condition: A debilitated planet gets cancellation of debilitation — e.g., lord of the sign where planet is debilitated is in kendra from Moon/Lagna
effects: Initial struggles transform into great success. Person overcomes disadvantage to achieve remarkable heights. Late bloomer.
strengthFactors: Multiple cancellation conditions strengthen it further.

name: Kaal Sarpa Yoga
condition: All seven planets (Sun through Saturn) hemmed between Rahu and Ketu on one side of the axis
effects: Obstacles, delays, feeling stuck. Life feels like constant struggle. Karmic debts from past lives. Success comes only after significant effort.
strengthFactors: Partial Kaal Sarpa (some planets outside) is milder. Stronger when Rahu-Ketu in 1-7 or 5-11 axis.

name: Manglik Dosha
condition: Mars in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, or 12 from Lagna, Moon, or Venus
effects: Delays in marriage, conflicts in married life, partner health concerns. Intensity in relationships. Strong will and temper.
strengthFactors: Cancelled if Mars in own/exalted sign, or partner also has Manglik dosha. Age after 28 naturally reduces intensity.

name: Chandra-Mangal Yoga
condition: Moon and Mars conjunct in same house
effects: Financial gains through own effort. Brave, determined, industrious. Good for real estate, property, maternal inheritance.
strengthFactors: Best in houses 2, 4, 10, 11. Weakened in 6, 8, 12.

name: Hamsa Yoga
condition: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exalted (Cancer) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Highly learned, virtuous, respected by rulers. Wealthy, handsome/beautiful, long-lived. Natural teacher and advisor.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Malavya Yoga
condition: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exalted (Pisces) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Beautiful appearance, luxurious lifestyle, artistic talents, happy marriage, wealth through vehicles and property.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 7th house.

name: Ruchaka Yoga
condition: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exalted (Capricorn) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Commander-like personality, brave, athletic, successful in military/police/sports. Sharp features, strong body, leadership.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Sasa Yoga
condition: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exalted (Libra) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Authority over villages/towns, politically powerful, wealth from industry/labor. Disciplined, persistent, respected elder.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Bhadra Yoga
condition: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exalted (Virgo) in kendra from Lagna
effects: Intelligent, eloquent speaker, skilled in arts and commerce. Success in business, writing, teaching. Strong analytical mind.
strengthFactors: One of the five Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas. Strongest in 1st or 10th house.

name: Saraswati Yoga
condition: Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury in kendra or trikona, with Jupiter in own/exalted/friend's sign
effects: Highly educated, master of arts and sciences, eloquent, poetic ability. Excellence in academics and creative fields.
strengthFactors: Rare yoga. All three planets should be strong and unafflicted.

name: Lakshmi Yoga
condition: Lord of 9th house strong and in kendra, with Lagna lord also strong
effects: Great wealth, fortune, luxurious life. Born into or acquires significant prosperity. Blessed by Goddess Lakshmi.
strengthFactors: Strongest when 9th lord is in own/exalted sign in 1st or 10th house.

name: Adhi Yoga
condition: Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in 6th, 7th, and 8th from Moon
effects: Polite, trustworthy, healthy, wealthy, able to overcome enemies. Leadership position in profession.
strengthFactors: Strongest when all three benefics are present. Even one or two create partial Adhi Yoga.

name: Sunapha Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Sun) in the 2nd house from Moon
effects: Self-made wealth, intelligent, good reputation. Earns through own merit, not inheritance.
strengthFactors: Results vary based on which planet occupies 2nd from Moon.

name: Anapha Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Sun) in the 12th house from Moon
effects: Strong physique, virtuous, comfortable life, good character. Well-dressed and dignified.
strengthFactors: Results vary based on which planet occupies 12th from Moon.

name: Durudhara Yoga
condition: Planets (except Sun) on both sides of Moon — in 2nd and 12th from Moon
effects: Wealthy, generous, enjoys vehicles and comforts. Famous, eloquent, charitable.
strengthFactors: Combines benefits of both Sunapha and Anapha yogas.

name: Amala Yoga
condition: Natural benefic (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, or full Moon) in 10th from Lagna or Moon
effects: Lasting fame, virtuous deeds, respected by society. Clean reputation throughout life.
strengthFactors: Jupiter in 10th gives best results. Mercury gives intellectual fame.

name: Veshi Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Moon) in 2nd house from Sun
effects: Truthful, lazy but capable, good memory, balanced temperament.
strengthFactors: Benefic in 2nd from Sun gives positive results; malefic gives mixed.

name: Vosi Yoga
condition: Any planet (except Moon) in 12th house from Sun
effects: Skilled, charitable, learned, good stamina.
strengthFactors: Benefic in 12th from Sun gives spiritual tendencies; malefic gives material focus.

name: Parvata Yoga
condition: Benefics in kendras, 6th and 8th houses are either empty or occupied by benefics
effects: Wealthy, famous, generous ruler-type personality. Protector of others.
strengthFactors: Rare when fully formed. Even partial formation gives good results.

name: Kemdrum Yoga
condition: No planet (except Sun, Rahu, Ketu) in 2nd or 12th house from Moon
effects: Poverty, loneliness, struggles, mental anxiety. Person may feel unsupported despite abilities. Financial instability and emotional isolation.
strengthFactors: Cancelled if Moon is in kendra from Lagna, or if Moon is aspected by Jupiter/Venus, or if kendras from Lagna/Moon are occupied. Kemadruma cancellation (bhanga) is very common.

name: Pitra Dosha
condition: Sun conjunct Rahu in the horoscope, especially in 9th house. Also formed when 9th lord is afflicted by Rahu/Ketu or Saturn.
effects: Ancestral karma, obstacles from father's side. Delays in career, issues with authority figures, problems with progeny. Past-life debts manifesting.
strengthFactors: Strongest in 1st, 5th, or 9th house. Remedied through ancestral rituals (Pind Daan, Tarpan). Jupiter's aspect can mitigate.

name: Guru Chandala Yoga
condition: Jupiter conjunct Rahu (or Ketu) in the same house
effects: Unorthodox beliefs, challenges to traditional values, unconventional guru/teacher. Can give brilliance in research but moral dilemmas. Foreign travel for education.
strengthFactors: Stronger in houses 1, 5, 9. Mitigated if Jupiter is in own/exalted sign. Rahu amplifies Jupiter's significations in unpredictable ways.

name: Angarak Yoga
condition: Mars conjunct Rahu in the same house
effects: Explosive temper, accidents, surgical interventions, conflicts with authority. Aggressive drive that can be channeled into courage and bold action if well-placed.
strengthFactors: Most intense in houses 1, 4, 7, 8, 10. Mitigated if Mars is in own/exalted sign or aspected by Jupiter.

name: Shakata Yoga
condition: Jupiter in 6th or 8th house from Moon
effects: Fluctuating fortune, ups and downs in life. Periodic setbacks despite talent. Loss of wealth and status followed by recovery. Unstable career.
strengthFactors: Cancelled if Jupiter is in kendra from Lagna. Less severe if Jupiter is strong in own/exalted sign.

name: Daridra Yoga
condition: Lord of 11th house placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house. Also formed when lords of income houses (2nd, 11th) are weak and afflicted.
effects: Financial hardship, poverty, difficulty in earning. Income lost to debts, health expenses, or wasteful spending. Struggles with savings.
strengthFactors: Stronger when multiple wealth-significators are afflicted. Mitigated by strong Jupiter or benefic aspects on 2nd/11th houses.

name: Chandra-Ketu Yoga
condition: Moon conjunct Ketu in the same house
effects: Detachment from emotions, spiritual inclination, psychic sensitivity. Difficulty connecting with mother or maternal figures. Anxiety and restlessness. Past-life spiritual karmas.
strengthFactors: Most impactful in houses 1, 4, 5, 8, 12. Mitigated by Jupiter's aspect. Can give profound intuition if well-aspected.

name: Grahan Yoga
condition: Sun or Moon conjunct Rahu or Ketu (luminaries eclipsed by shadow planets)
effects: Health issues related to eyes/head (Sun-Rahu) or mind/emotions (Moon-Rahu/Ketu). Confusion about life purpose. Karmic challenges. Can also give research ability and deep investigation skills.
strengthFactors: Intensity depends on closeness of conjunction (within 5 degrees is strong). Jupiter's aspect significantly reduces negative effects.

name: Vish Yoga
condition: Moon conjunct Saturn in the same house
effects: Emotional heaviness, depression tendencies, delayed emotional development. Strained relationship with mother. Hard work with delayed rewards. Responsible and mature beyond age.
strengthFactors: Strongest in houses 1, 4, 7, 8. Mitigated by Jupiter's aspect or if Saturn is in own/exalted sign. Results improve with age.

name: Kahala Yoga
condition: Lords of 4th and 9th houses in mutual kendras, and Lagna lord is strong
effects: Bold, daring, head of a group or army. Stubborn but courageous. Good for leadership in military, police, or competitive fields.
strengthFactors: Strongest when involving Mars or Sun. Lagna lord must be in good dignity.

name: Chamara Yoga
condition: Lagna lord exalted and aspected by Jupiter, occupying a kendra or trikona
effects: Eloquent speaker, learned scholar, advisor to rulers. Long-lived, morally upright, commands respect in assemblies.
strengthFactors: Jupiter's aspect is essential. Strongest when Lagna lord is in 1st, 9th, or 10th house.

name: Akhanda Samrajya Yoga
condition: Jupiter rules 2nd, 5th, or 11th house AND is in kendra from Lagna or Moon, with 11th lord in kendra
effects: Undivided empire/kingdom. Great political power, immense authority, lasting legacy. In modern context: CEO, political leader, head of large organization.
strengthFactors: Extremely rare. Requires strong Jupiter and unafflicted 11th lord. Multiple supporting Raj Yogas amplify it.

name: Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga
condition: Any of the five tara grahas (Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) in own or exalted sign AND in kendra from Lagna. Forms: Ruchaka (Mars), Bhadra (Mercury), Hamsa (Jupiter), Malavya (Venus), Sasa (Saturn).
effects: Each gives qualities of the respective planet at its best. Collectively, they produce great individuals — leaders, scholars, artists, administrators, and commanders.
strengthFactors: Strongest in 1st or 10th house. Weakened if the planet is combust or hemmed by malefics. Multiple Mahapurusha Yogas in one chart are very powerful.

name: Ubhayachari Yoga
condition: Planets (other than Moon) on both sides of Sun — in 2nd and 12th from Sun simultaneously
effects: Balanced personality, good speaker, wealthy, well-respected. Combines benefits of Veshi and Vosi yogas. Equal in status to rulers.
strengthFactors: Benefics on both sides give best results. Malefics give mixed results — strength but conflicts.

name: Parivartana Yoga
condition: Two planets exchange houses — each occupies the sign ruled by the other (e.g., Mars in Gemini and Mercury in Aries)
effects: Strong connection between the two houses involved. Creates powerful synergy. Maha Parivartana (involving kendra/trikona lords) gives Raj Yoga-like results. Dainya Parivartana (involving dusthana lords) gives struggles.
strengthFactors: Maha Parivartana (1-5, 1-9, 5-9, etc.) is most auspicious. Dainya Parivartana (involving 6, 8, 12) is challenging. Khala Parivartana is mixed.

name: Pravrajya Yoga
condition: Four or more planets (including Saturn) conjunct in one house, or strong Saturn influencing luminaries and Lagna lord. Moon in Navamsa of Saturn aspected by Saturn.
effects: Ascetic/spiritual life, renunciation of material world. Deep spiritual inclination, may take sanyasa. Interest in meditation, monasticism, or service.
strengthFactors: Stronger when involving 8th, 12th houses or their lords. Jupiter's involvement gives dignified renunciation. Saturn-Ketu-Moon combinations are classic indicators.

name: Shrinatha Yoga
condition: Lord of 7th house exalted in 10th house, and 10th lord is with 9th lord
effects: Great wealth, equivalent to a king. Prosperity through partnerships and business. Spouse brings fortune.
strengthFactors: All involved lords should be strong and unafflicted. Jupiter's association amplifies wealth.

name: Maha Bhagya Yoga
condition: For males: day birth, Sun/Moon/Lagna all in odd signs. For females: night birth, Sun/Moon/Lagna all in even signs.
effects: Great fortune, long life, fame, wealth, virtuous character. Person is blessed from birth. Rises to prominence. Respected and prosperous throughout life.
strengthFactors: Extremely auspicious when fully formed. Partial formation (2 of 3 conditions) gives reduced but still positive results.

name: Pushkala Yoga
condition: Lagna lord and Moon sign lord conjunct, aspected by a strong planet, and Lagna is a fixed sign with a strong planet in it
effects: Famous, wealthy, sweet-spoken, respected by rulers. Blessed with comfort, honor, and public acclaim.
strengthFactors: Strongest in fixed Lagnas (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius). Benefic aspects enhance fame.

name: Vasumati Yoga
condition: All natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, Moon) in upachaya houses (3, 6, 10, 11) from Lagna or Moon
effects: Immense wealth, financial prosperity throughout life. Person never faces poverty. Earns through multiple avenues.
strengthFactors: Strongest when benefics are unafflicted and in good dignity. Even 2-3 benefics in upachayas give partial results.

name: Raja Yoga (9th-10th combination)
condition: Lords of 9th house (dharma) and 10th house (karma) conjunct, mutually aspect, or exchange signs
effects: The most powerful Raja Yoga. Supreme success in career, authority, fame, and righteous power. Fortune supports professional achievements.
strengthFactors: Strongest when both lords are strong in dignity and placed in kendras or trikonas. Jupiter as either lord amplifies results.

name: Sunapha Yoga (Mars variant)
condition: Mars in 2nd house from Moon
effects: Wealth through land, property, real estate, or military/police service. Bold, aggressive earner. Self-made through courage and physical effort.
strengthFactors: Stronger in earth signs or Mars's own signs. Weakened if Mars is debilitated.

name: Sunapha Yoga (Jupiter variant)
condition: Jupiter in 2nd house from Moon
effects: Wealth through teaching, law, advisory, religion, or banking. Wise, respected, earns through knowledge. Financially secure through ethical means.
strengthFactors: Best results when Jupiter is in own or exalted sign. Aspect from other benefics amplifies.

name: Anapha Yoga (Venus variant)
condition: Venus in 12th house from Moon
effects: Comfortable life through arts, luxury goods, entertainment, or beauty-related fields. Enjoys fine things, well-dressed, attractive personality.
strengthFactors: Best in Venus's own or exalted signs. Association with Jupiter adds spiritual depth to material comforts.

name: Anapha Yoga (Saturn variant)
condition: Saturn in 12th house from Moon
effects: Leadership through hard work and persistence. May manage large organizations or government bodies. Serious demeanor but strong character.
strengthFactors: Better when Saturn is in own or exalted sign. Age improves results significantly.

name: Chandra Adhi Yoga
condition: Benefics in 6th, 7th, and 8th houses from Moon specifically, with at least two of three positions occupied by benefics
effects: Polite, wealthy, healthy, defeats enemies gracefully. Ministerial or advisory position. Trustworthy and well-mannered leader.
strengthFactors: Full Adhi Yoga (all three houses occupied) is rare and very powerful. Even partial (2 positions) gives strong results.

name: Gaja Yoga
condition: Lord of 9th in kendra and lord of 5th in trikona, both strong and unafflicted
effects: Prosperity, high status, noble character. Person rises in life through righteous conduct and good fortune.
strengthFactors: Stronger with Jupiter's involvement. Well-placed benefics in chart amplify results.

name: Kalanidhi Yoga
condition: Jupiter in 2nd or 5th house conjunct or aspected by Mercury and Venus
effects: Highly learned in arts and sciences, patron of arts, virtuous, wealthy. Excels in music, dance, or literature. Deeply cultured personality.
strengthFactors: Strongest when Jupiter is in own/exalted sign. All three planets should be well-placed.

name: Hari Yoga
condition: Benefics in 2nd, 12th, and 8th houses from the lord of the 2nd house
effects: Happy, blessed, lucky. Supported by friends and family. Material and spiritual comforts throughout life.
strengthFactors: Rare yoga. Best when all involved benefics are strong and in good dignity.

name: Brahma Yoga
condition: Jupiter in kendra from 9th lord, Venus in kendra from 11th lord, and Mercury in kendra from either Lagna lord or 10th lord
effects: Long life, wealthy, respected, learned. Enjoys all comforts, good reputation, blessed with family happiness.
strengthFactors: All planets involved must be strong. Very rare when fully formed.

name: Chatussagara Yoga
condition: All four kendras (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) occupied by planets
effects: Famous, long-lived, prosperous, virtuous. Respected across regions. Leadership in social or political spheres.
strengthFactors: Benefics in kendras give better results than malefics. More planets strengthen the yoga.
